note: OW05 Urayasu strait two-mesh-ization at the DATA level (owner 2026-07-15: 'stay faithful to the coastline but convert some land to water and widen'). Mesh surgery was measured out (true strait 430 m = 1.2h; node moves collapse the coastal ring). rev 2: the first arc (901 m, mouth only) moved the flag to its western taper seam against the policy's own 637 m corridor -- the W10 lesson holds, an edit must span the WHOLE reach. This arc follows the policy branch arc across the full ~2 km reach plus the mouth, 700 m throughout; the policy then sees a wide-enough natural channel and leaves it alone.
